title: Youth Esports Programming, Community Battery Recycling Kiosks, and Annual Music Licensing
summary: Item 12: Agreement with Elite Gaming for instructional e-sports programming at Wilson Park (live) and Southwest Community Center (launching February 2026). Item 13: OCRRA battery recycling kiosk agreement for four city community centers, funded by Department of Energy grant expanding from suburban locations. Council raised safety concerns and suggested City Hall as additional drop-off. Items 14-15 withdrawn. Items 16-17: Annual ASCAP and SESAC music licensing for Parks programming.
